languages.text: ...оставшиеся в живых техножрецы перегрузили свои генераторы, создав преграду из Движущей Силы.
...the surviving Tech-Priests overloaded their generators, creating a barrier of Motive Force.
languages.original_text: ...оставшиеся в живых техножрецы перегрузили свои генераторы, создав преграду из Движущей Силы.

languages.text: ... los tecnosacerdotes restantes sobrecargaron sus generadores, creando una barrera con la Fuerza Motriz.
languages.original_text: ...the surviving Tech-Priests overloaded their generators, creating a barrier of Motive Force.

traits.locale_text: ... los tecnosacerdotes restantes sobrecargaron sus generadores, creando una barrera con la Fuerza Motriz.

languages.text: ... les technoprêtres survivants ont fait tourner leurs générateurs à plein régime, créant ainsi un bouclier de Force Motrice.
languages.original_text: ...the surviving Tech-Priests overloaded their generators, creating a barrier of Motive Force.

traits.locale_text: ... les technoprêtres survivants ont fait tourner leurs générateurs à plein régime, créant ainsi un bouclier de Force Motrice.

languages.text: ……幸存的技术神甫们过载了发电机，制造出一道源力屏障。
languages.original_text: ...the surviving Tech-Priests overloaded their generators, creating a barrier of Motive Force.

traits.locale_text: ……幸存的技术神甫们过载了发电机，制造出一道源力屏障。

languages.text: ... die überlebenden Techpriester überluden ihre Generatoren, um eine Barriere aus Antriebskraft zu erzeugen.
languages.original_text: ...the surviving Tech-Priests overloaded their generators, creating a barrier of Motive Force.

traits.locale_text: ... die überlebenden Techpriester überluden ihre Generatoren, um eine Barriere aus Antriebskraft zu erzeugen.

languages.text: hayatta kalan Tekno Rahipler, jeneratörlerine aşırı yüklenerek bir Devinim Gücü bariyeri oluşturdu.
languages.original_text: ...the surviving Tech-Priests overloaded their generators, creating a barrier of Motive Force.

traits.locale_text: hayatta kalan Tekno Rahipler, jeneratörlerine aşırı yüklenerek bir Devinim Gücü bariyeri oluşturdu.

languages.text: ...生き残ったテクプリストたちは、発電機を過負荷にして、動機力の障壁を作り上げた。
languages.original_text: ...the surviving Tech-Priests overloaded their generators, creating a barrier of Motive Force.

traits.locale_text: ...生き残ったテクプリストたちは、発電機を過負荷にして、動機力の障壁を作り上げた。
